sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85516" key="polufradi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολυφρᾰδ-ία</orth>, poet. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-ίη, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, u(/ mnwn</foreign> <sense id="n85516.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">eloquence</tr_> of song, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0213.tlg001:7:50" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hermesian.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.50</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
